summary: World-first cryptographically-verified mutation decision timeline reconstruction. excavate() scans distributed ledgers and assembles a complete chronological DecisionEvent list for any mutation_id. SHA-256 digest chain (GAM-CHAIN-0) provides tamper-evident provenance. Fail-open design (GAM-FAIL-OPEN-0) ensures corrupt ledger lines never block archaeology. verify_chain() enables instant tamper detection.
ip_claims: Distributed ledger scan with cryptographic timeline digest for autonomous AI mutation provenance
SHA-256 chained decision archaeology with stable timestamp-sorted event reconstruction
Fail-open multi-root ledger excavation with terminal-event outcome resolution
